inline_comments.message:
Hi Dan,
You are rolling back to an older version of global-jjb, which I believe is not intended here, so please remove this change. Probably you will need to update the global-jjb submodule in your local environment with the following command at the root path of your cloned repo: git submodule update --init

same here, you are changing the version of common-packer which doesn't seem required for disabling sbom-generator. Running git submodule update --init at the root path of you cloned repo will update the common-packer submodule in your local environment properly.
